policy_description: This step only parses struct_conn and executes evidence cross-checks.
Ligand atom names must be copied from raw struct_conn records.
Evidence requires a CYS SG partner.
Evidence requires the expected ligand HET partner.
CYS SG to CYS SG records are not ligand evidence.
A result review gate is required before ready status.
Training is not allowed in this step.
Sample and final dataset artifacts are not written.
Feature semantics audit remains required before training.
The canonical five mask tasks remain unchanged.
